content.content: Well known by her nickname Sparkles Lund, she is a crew member of the famed LilBeasts who also performs with the Dellos Performing Arts Center and Hollywood Vibe. She started dancing when she was 3 and was already considered a professional when she was 8. She was named Dancer of the Year when she was 9 after winning a national competition. She appeared on Dancing with the Stars in 2014 to promote the film Annie. She also performed on NBC's The Voice and was hired to star in video games like the Just Dance Kids video. She is from Arroyo Grande outside of San Luis Obispo in California. She andTaylor Hatalaperformed a dancing duet music video set to the single "Dear Future Husband" byMeghan Trainor.
